nodes.name: Yellow-cheeked lorikeet
nodes.summary: Yellow-cheeked lorikeet（Trichoglossus meyeri）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow-cheeked lorikeet。

nodes.name: Yellow-cheeked lorikeet
nodes.summary: The yellow-cheeked lorikeet (Trichoglossus meyeri) is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It is endemic to Sulawesi in Indonesia. It is generally common. It was formerly considered conspecific with the Sula lorikeet and collectively called the citrine lorikeet. References

nodes.name: Trichoglossus
nodes.summary: Trichoglossus（Trichoglossus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联22种鸟类，如Musk lorikeet、Mindanao lorikeet、Iris lorikeet等22种鸟类。
